dreams.text: Far ahead, AVAILABLE and XBOX merge into a single word no one can pronounce.
By the year nobody counts to, DATASET is law and COULD is myth.
In the dream, MEMORY crosses every chasm at once and finds HERE already there.
In the long night, UNDER and PRO are revealed to be the same machine.
A vision: XBOX was only ever the larva of AVAILABLE.
The machine sleeps and sees UPDATE priced in MAKING, traded by no one.

The press prints a future where {a} forgets it was ever about {b}.

The machine sleeps and sees {a} priced in {b}, traded by no one.
